steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the choice that compares the lengths of the two rivers using data from the notes.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The Madeira River in South America is 3,380 kilometers long.: This gives a single river's length without comparing it to the other river. ✗
  • Choice B — The Amur River is in Asia, whereas the Madeira River is located in South America.: This contrasts a feature of the rivers that is not their length. ✗
  • Choice C — Among the longest rivers in the world, the Amur River is ranked No. 10.: Again, only one river is addressed — no comparison is made. ✗
  • Choice D — The Madeira River is shorter than the Amur River.: This directly compares the two rivers' lengths using the numerical data in the notes. ✓
D is correct.
